summary: Tested new AutoActivityLogMiddleware, Yemen timezone conversion (+03:00), manual-log de-duplication, failed-op no-log, and regression endpoints (master-view, valid-slots, teacher-preferences defaults). Frontend smoke: /activity-logs and /weekly-schedule (master view). All 8 backend pytest cases pass. Two minor frontend observations.

ui_bugs.issue: Entries from AutoActivityLogMiddleware display raw English snake_case action code as badge (e.g. 'put_teacher_preferences', 'post_init_admin', 'delete_student') instead of Arabic action_ar (backend does populate action_ar like 'تعديل تفضيلات معلم', 'حذف طالب'). Only manually-logged 'تسجيل دخول' renders Arabic. Root cause is likely the UI reading `action` field instead of `action_ar` (or missing i18n mapping for these keys).

action_items: In frontend/app/activity-logs.tsx, display item.action_ar (fallback to item.action) so auto-logged entries show Arabic descriptions instead of raw action codes like 'put_teacher_preferences'.

(Optional) The auto-log fallback for unmatched paths uses seg-based fallback: post /api/init-admin resulted in action_ar='إنشاء — init_admin'; consider adding an explicit skip or Arabic rule for /api/init-admin if noise.

(Optional) Auto-log payload includes {details.path, details.method} JSON that is rendered as raw JSON string in the timeline UI — consider suppressing details JSON display for auto logs and only show the Arabic description.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py > 16k lines — very large monolith; consider splitting further.

AutoActivityLogMiddleware buffers no body (good perf) but auto-logs currently record entity_id=None and entity_name=None which loses linkage for auto entries; the frontend already relies on details.path/id substring; consider extracting id from path regex to populate entity_id.

_AUTO_LOG_RULES for /api/roles, /api/holidays, /api/rooms, /api/semesters etc. match any method incl. POST/PUT/DELETE — verify manual routes call mark_manual_activity_logged() to avoid duplicates (teacher-preferences confirmed OK: 2 PUTs = 2 logs).
students.py has a shadow delete_student without manual log; make sure only the server.py delete_student route (which calls log_activity + mark_manual_activity_logged via log_activity) is registered.
seed_data_creation: Test student created and deleted within test (student_id starts with TEST-AUTOLOG-...). No residual data. Two PUTs to teacher-preferences 698e533beb4c6eb021c50302 with unavailable_periods finally empty (returned to empty state).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend middleware/timezone verified via pytest test_activity_logs_autolog.py (8/8). Key API test: GET /api/activity-logs returns dict OR list; timestamps must end with '+03:00'. Auto logs carry details.path; manual logs carry entity_id and no details.path. Frontend activity-logs page renders JSON details verbatim and uses action code instead of action_ar for auto logs — see action_items.
rca of the issue: Reproduction of frontend label issue: login as admin, PUT /api/teacher-preferences/... then open /activity-logs — the new row shows badge 'put_teacher_preferences' instead of 'تعديل تفضيلات معلم'. Backend document DOES contain action_ar='تعديل تفضيلات معلم'. Fix should be in frontend/app/activity-logs.tsx to prefer action_ar when present.
